creator: mark@work.drapple.com
text:
If you try to build the Worperfect 8 for linux port (editors/wordperfect)
it tells you to go to http://linux.corel.com/products/wp8/download.htm to
download GUILG00.GZ.  Upon going that page, the user gets a message that
Corel is no longer distributing Wordperfect 8 for Linux, and provides a
link to their other Linux products.

My ports tree was updated via cvsup approx 13:00PST on 08/29/2001.

Fix: 

I'm not sure what Corel's position on WP8 for Linux is.  If they are willing,
then it can get a distribution site (or several) created.  If not, then ??
How-To-Repeat: 
cvsup your ports tree 
cd /usr/ports/editors/wordperfect
make fetch
Then go to the web page as instructed.  GUILG00.GZ is not obtainable
